title: cyclobalanopsis thorelii
intro: Cyclobalanopsis thorelii, also known as the Vietnamese white oak, is a species of tree native to Vietnam and southern China. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese herbalism, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis thorelii include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. Cyclobalanopsis thorelii is often prepared as a tea or decoction for its medicinal uses, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations.
